glosses.ja: 長くする; 横になる

sentences.target: Tu peux allonger le café, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø a.lɔ̃ʒe lə ka.fe sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux allonger le café, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø a.lɔ̃ʒe lə ka.fe sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Could you water down the coffee, please?
translations.de: Kannst du den Kaffee bitte mit Wasser verdünnen?
translations.it: Puoi allungare il caffè, per favore?
translations.yue: 可唔可以幫我喺咖啡度加啲水？
translations.pt: Pode colocar um pouco de água no café, por favor?
translations.he: אתה יכול לדלל את הקפה בבקשה?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể cho thêm nước vào cà phê được không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك تخفيف القهوة من فضلك؟
translations.nl: Kun je de koffie een beetje aanlengen, alsjeblieft?
translations.hi: क्या तुम कृपया कॉफ़ी में थोड़ा पानी मिला दोगे?
translations.el: Μπορείς να αραιώσεις τον καφέ, σε παρακαλώ;
translations.nb: Kan du spe ut kaffen, vær så snill?
translations.sv: Kan du späda ut kaffet, tack?
translations.ro: Poți să diluezi cafeaua, te rog?
translations.ja: コーヒーを薄めてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun (informal ‘you’); subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 2nd person singular present indicative; selects the infinitive ‘allonger’ to express ability/permission.
Infinitive verb complement of ‘peux’; here with direct object ‘le café’ (idiomatically: dilute coffee by adding water).
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun ‘café’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘allonger’.
Elided subordinating conjunction ‘si’ before vowel; introduces the clause in the fixed polite formula.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; subject of ‘plaît’ in the impersonal expression.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object ‘to you’) with ‘plaire’.
3rd person singular present indicative; part of the fixed expression ‘s’il te plaît’ (‘please’).

sentences.target: J'allonge la sauce avec un peu d'eau.
sentences.reading: /ʒa.lɔ̃ʒ la sos avɛk œ̃ pø do/

translations.fr: J'allonge la sauce avec un peu d'eau.
translations.ipa: /ʒa.lɔ̃ʒ la sos avɛk œ̃ pø do/
translations.en: I'm thinning the sauce with a bit of water.
translations.es: Estoy diluyendo la salsa con un poco de agua.
translations.de: Ich verdünne die Soße mit etwas Wasser.
translations.it: Allungo la salsa con un po' d'acqua.
translations.ko: 소스에 물을 조금 넣어 묽게 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我用一点水把酱汁稀释一下。
translations.yue: 我加少少水令個汁稀啲。
translations.pt: Estou diluindo o molho com um pouco de água.
translations.he: אני מדלל את הרוטב עם קצת מים.
translations.vi: Tôi đang pha loãng nước sốt với một chút nước.
translations.ar: أنا أُخفف الصلصة بقليل من الماء.
translations.nl: Ik verdun de saus met een beetje water.
translations.hu: Egy kis vízzel hígítom a szószt.
translations.hi: मैं सॉस में थोड़ा पानी मिलाकर उसे पतला कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Αραιώνω τη σάλτσα με λίγο νερό.
translations.nb: Jeg tynner ut sausen med litt vann.
translations.id: Saya mengencerkan saus dengan sedikit air.
translations.sv: Jag späder ut såsen med lite vatten.
translations.da: Jeg fortynder saucen med lidt vand.
translations.ja: ソースを少し水で薄めています。

tokens.explanation: Elided 1st person singular subject clitic ‘je’ before a vowel-initial verb.
1st person singular present indicative; main predicate (‘I lengthen/extend’), taking ‘la sauce’ as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘sauce’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘allonge’.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/means adjunct.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determining ‘peu’.
Common noun (head of the quantifier construction ‘un peu de’ meaning ‘a little/a bit’).
Elided preposition ‘de’ before vowel; links the quantifier ‘peu’ to its complement.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of ‘de’ in ‘un peu d’eau’.

sentences.target: On allonge la table pour les invités.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a.lɔ̃ʒ la tabl puʁ lez ɛ̃vite/

translations.fr: On allonge la table pour les invités.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a.lɔ̃ʒ la tabl puʁ lez ɛ̃vite/
translations.en: We're extending the table for the guests.
translations.es: Estamos ampliando la mesa para los invitados.
translations.de: Wir verlängern den Tisch für die Gäste.
translations.it: Allunghiamo il tavolo per gli ospiti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把桌子加长给客人用。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗啲客人將張枱拉長。
translations.pt: Estamos aumentando a mesa para os convidados.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi kéo dài bàn cho khách.
translations.nl: We verlengen de tafel voor de gasten.
translations.hi: हम मेहमानों के लिए मेज बढ़ा रहे हैं।
translations.el: Επεκτείνουμε το τραπέζι για τους καλεσμένους.
translations.id: Kami memperpanjang meja untuk para tamu.
translations.ja: 来客のためにテーブルを伸ばしています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (‘one’/colloquial ‘we’); triggers 3rd singular agreement.
3rd person singular present indicative; main verb with direct object ‘la table’.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘table’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘allonge’.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/comitative complement.
Definite article, plural, introducing ‘invités’.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Vous allongez le délai de paiement.

translations.fr: Vous allongez le délai de paiement.
translations.es: Están ampliando el plazo de pago.
translations.it: State prorogando la scadenza di pagamento.
translations.pt: Vocês estão prorrogando o prazo de pagamento.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang gia hạn thời hạn thanh toán.
translations.hi: आप भुगतान की समय-सीमा बढ़ा रहे हैं।
translations.ja: 支払い期限を延長しています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person plural (or formal singular) subject pronoun.
2nd person plural present indicative; main predicate.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘délai’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘allongez’.
Preposition introducing a noun complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of ‘délai’ introduced by ‘de’.

Allunghiamo il tavolo per gli ospiti.
